bibliographic_info.title: A real-time high accurate positioning method for vehicles in long-mileage transportation

grounding_quotes: For real-time acquisition of precise orbit and clock corrections, the system utilizes the BeiDou Navigation Satellite System-3 (BDS-3) PPP-B2bservice,integratingPPP-B2bcorrectionmessageswithbroadcastephemeristoeliminatethelatencyassociatedwithtraditional preciseproducts.Thesystemwasevaluatedusingdatafromtwolandvehicleexperiments.Thereal-timevelocityandpositioningaccu- raciesachievedusingPPP-B2bsig
